_comment: Maps each vendored shim component under packages/design-dojo/src/ to its counterpart in the standalone @plures/design-dojo repo (https://github.com/plures/design-dojo). Populated per ADR-0035. Consumed by scripts/check-design-dojo-drift.mjs.

SettingsPanel.svelte.notes: Founding shim comment said remove at npm v0.13+; npm is at 0.17.1. Stale — flagged by drift check.

Sidebar.svelte.notes: 285 differing lines vs standalone (ADR-0035 audit). Reverted twice historically (20acb73, 0eb0734) due to API incompatibility — needs triage before removal, not blind sync.

Input.svelte.notes: 532 differing lines vs standalone (largest primitive diff).

Select.svelte.notes: Not yet line-diffed in ADR-0035; flagged for triage.

FirstRunWizard.svelte.notes: 656 differing lines vs standalone (largest diff, needs the most reconciliation care).

Heading.svelte.notes: Not yet line-diffed in ADR-0035; flagged for triage.

TextArea.svelte.notes: Not yet line-diffed in ADR-0035; flagged for triage.

Link.svelte.notes: Not yet line-diffed in ADR-0035; flagged for triage.

CodeBlock.svelte.notes: Not yet line-diffed in ADR-0035; flagged for triage.

Canvas2D.svelte.notes: Not yet line-diffed in ADR-0035; flagged for triage.

PluginContentArea.svelte.notes: Not yet line-diffed in ADR-0035; flagged for triage.

GraphView.svelte.notes: ADR-0035 pilot reconciliation: shim now byte-identical to standalone repo HEAD (c0c7667) modulo the local './types-local.js' vs upstream './GraphView.types.js' type-import path, which is an intentional, documented override (see DRIFT.md) required because the shim package does not (yet) ship GraphView.types.ts as a separate module. Everything else — including the upstream doc header — is synced verbatim.

DataGrid.svelte.notes: Not present upstream (ADR-0035 §2.1). Reclassified as an upstream contribution owed, not drift. Tracked as a pares-radix -> design-dojo upstreaming task, not a sync target for this check.

SchemaForm.svelte.notes: Not present upstream (ADR-0035 §2.1). Same disposition as DataGrid.svelte.
